channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Public bin overflowing, 23rd June
item.description:
Public bin by the bus stop needs emptying. Looks like residents nearby are leaving their white household waste bags in and around the bin, adding to the problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown plants, 23rd June
item.description:
Majority stinging and thorny plants, just passed them and got stung all over the legs. Dog walkers go here to cool off, etc this is a very important byway and needs maintenance all over the entire byway, inc trees. This has been for recently as its summer and plants grow quickly, now it is obsessive and an extreme nuisance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in entrance of Penhill Park, Rowley Avenue, Sidcup, 23rd June
item.description:
Dead fox in entrance of Penhill Park, Rowley Avenue, Sidcup Resident advised there is a dead fox at the entrance of penhill park in a huge puddle- it is blocking the entrance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Rowley Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside of 6, 23rd June
item.description:
The drain is full of dedbry and over flows with rain and takes forever to subside

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Terrace, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large mdf boards flytipped, 23rd June
item.description:
There are a number of big mdf sheets leaning against the railings of the old police station on Penge High Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover lifted, 23rd June
item.description:
Drain cover has lifted by the number 3 bus stop. Aprox 2cm above footpath level so very dangerous with kids on scooters going to/from school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Wood Park, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen bollard and damaged paving, 23rd June
item.description:
Knocked over bollard and collapsed paving stones are a trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pulross Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd June
item.description:
Old hill Chislehurst up from imperial pub

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oak Cottages, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist, 23rd June
item.description:
Lots of litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: City Garden Clearing, 23rd June
item.description:
Trees overgrown, requires to be cleared. For safety reasons.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balls Pond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned no mot, 23rd June
item.description:
3rd time reporting Still not moved Apparently no mot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wallbutton Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Both drains blocked 38 and 9d Homefield Road, 23rd June
item.description:
Both drains outside 9d and 38 Homefield are blocked from heavy rainfall. Please could these be cleared and cleaned Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of 39 harvist road, 23rd June
item.description:
Rubbish left on the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal in the middle of the road, 23rd June
item.description:
There is a dead animal lying in the middle of the hatfields road. Cars keep going over it. There is a lot of blood. Near 21-22 Hatfields
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatfields, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low hanging branch in Hackney Downs, 23rd June
item.description:
Large snapped off branch weighing another down over the path and potentially at risk of breaking the supporting branch

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin has been removed, 23rd June
item.description:
The bin has been removed or stolen from the end of the alleyway. Now there is rubbish up and down it, not just where the photo was taken - from the children’s centre to southwold road. Rubbish has blown into all the green either side of the path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree's all along public footpath, 23rd June
item.description:
Footpath is dark and dingy all overgrown
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches encroaching on house, 23rd June
item.description:
The branches are growing and approaching the house. Branches fall off and could result in damage to property. One of huge branches fell today and has just been removed. This is getting dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large areas of the road need filling, 23rd June
item.description:
Road surface needs fixing as large areas are damaged along Elderslie Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elderslie Close, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of mud and stones on Calmont Road/Warren Avenue, 23rd June
item.description:
The road is now hazardous after the big storm in the early hours - please could the road be cleared up as soon as possible. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warren Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
